The plugin logo now shows in the Plugins tab.

## Fixed
- The new white-framed logo appears in Unraid's **Plugins tab**. The previous
  `icon=` URL was treated by Unraid as a local path and fell back to the generic
  puzzle piece. Now the logo ships inside the package (`images/` + `icons/`) and
  Unraid auto-resolves it. The Plugins-list entry is lowercase **shiplog** for
  that resolution to work; **Settings** and **Community Apps** stay **ShipLog**.

## Install / update
Unraid → **Plugins** (or Community Applications → search **ShipLog**), or by URL:

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```
